assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md shows all 5 versions (2.2.0 through 2.2.4) with Affected? = NO. Each ships serde_json 1.0.138 or 1.0.139, both >= 1.0.135 fix threshold. Conclusion states: 'No supported versions are affected by CVE-2026-28940.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 8 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md heading: 'Decision: Propose Closing as Not a Bug'. Rationale references 'Case C: No supported versions affected'. Section 2 proposes transitioning TC-8002 to Closed with resolution 'Not a Bug'. Final section 'No Remediation Tasks Created' confirms no tasks are created.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '1. Proposed Comment' includes a table listing all versions (2.2.0-2.2.4) with their serde_json versions (1.0.138 or 1.0.139) and Affected? status (all NO), plus text: 'All supported versions ship serde_json 1.0.138 or 1.0.139, which are outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 8 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '3. Proposed VEX Justification': 'Set VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345) to Component not Present -- the vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not included in any supported release.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 8 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section 'No Remediation Tasks Created': 'no remediation tasks are created when no supported versions are affected. There is no upstream backport task and no downstream propagation task.' No remediation.md output file was produced.
